name: storytellers-pr900-review
task: Review Storytellers PR #900 (codex/amf-affiliate-campaign -> staging) for correctness, regressions, security, money-path integrity, and missing tests. Preserve buyer checkout availability; verify held-ledger commission accrual and refund reversal; keep active Pro eligibility separate from campaign premium-school approval; enforce default 10% and approved premium 20%; exclude multi-recipient split behavior. Report findings with file references and focused verification evidence.
playbook_description: Review a pull request for bugs, regressions, security, and missing tests.

alternates.description: Reproduce, isolate, fix, and verify a bug.
Review code or architecture for security risk.

workflow.output: findings ordered by severity with file references
workflow.validation: use git diff, tests, or static checks as available
workflow.recovery: if no PR is available, ask for branch, diff, or PR URL

routing_facts: plan: Active Milestone: M025: Design-System Foundation + Feature Co-location (roadmap: `.gsd/milestones/M025/ROADMAP.md`)

steps.selection_reason: best installed match (60) for code review

steps.reason: Check trust boundaries, secrets, injection, and auth gaps.
steps.selection_reason: best installed match (110) for security review

steps.reason: Check that changed behavior has regression coverage.
